item.title: SEO and Open Graph meta tags
item.intent: Every page must emit correct Open Graph tags, Twitter cards, canonical URLs, and JSON-LD structured data (Article, TechArticle, SoftwareApplication as appropriate) so shares look professional, search indexing is accurate, and Google rich results work.
item.description: Extend Base.astro to accept optional SEO props (description, image, type, article metadata) and render OG/Twitter/JSON-LD in <head>. Every page must pass at minimum title and description. JSON-LD type varies: Article for commentary, TechArticle for architecture, SoftwareApplication for products, WebSite for home.
steps: Extend Base.astro Props interface with optional SEO fields: description, ogImage, ogType, articleDate, articleTags
Render og:title, og:description, og:type, og:url meta tags in <head>
Render twitter:card, twitter:title, twitter:description meta tags
Add canonical URL meta tag using Astro.url
Create a JSON-LD helper function that generates Article/TechArticle/SoftwareApplication/WebSite schema
Update existing pages to pass description prop to Base layout (pages that don't already)

acceptanceCriteria.text: Home page renders og:title meta tag
Home page includes JSON-LD structured data
